questions: what to do if a dog bites
dog bite hole hospital jete hobe
answers: If a dog bites you, wash the wound thoroughly with soap and running water for at least 10 minutes. Then go to a hospital immediately for rabies vaccination — it's critical even if the wound looks small.
Kukur kamrale prothome shabu pani diye bhalo kore dhute hobe 10 minute. Tarpor hospital e giye rabies vaccine nite hobe. Late korle rabies fatal hote pare, tai deri korben na.
Dog bite treatment: Clean the wound with soap and water, apply antiseptic, and visit a doctor ASAP. You'll need rabies post-exposure prophylaxis (PEP) vaccine — usually 4-5 doses over a month.
Kukur katley vaccine nite hobe 0, 3, 7, 14, and 28 din e — total 5 ta dose. Prothom dose joto tara tara newa uchit. Wound ta betadine diye clean korun ar hospital e jan.
